# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prebuild
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR: "ci/scripts"
  BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR: "build"
  ARTIFACTS_DIR: "artifacts"
  ENABLE_PREBUILD: "true"
  ENABLE_BUILD: "true"
  ENABLE_TEST: "true"
  ENABLE_PACKAGE: "true"
  ENABLE_DEPLOY: "false"

.shared_runner_template:
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - echo "Starting job on shared runner"
    - echo "Repository - $CI_PROJECT_NAME"
    - echo "Branch - $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.rb 2>/dev/null || true
  after_script:
    - echo "Job completed"

prebuild:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: prebuild
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_PREBUILD" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Running prebuild phase"
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom prebuild script"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.sh
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.py" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom prebuild Python script"
          python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.py
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.rb" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom prebuild Ruby script"
          ruby ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.rb
        else
          echo "No prebuild script found, skipping"
        fi
      else
        echo "Prebuild phase disabled"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/
    expire_in: 1 hour
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PREBUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

build:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_BUILD" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Running build phase"
        mkdir -p ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}
        mkdir -p ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
        
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom build script (bash)"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.py" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom build script (python)"
          python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.py
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.rb" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom build script (ruby)"
          ruby ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.rb
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.js" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom build script (node)"
          node ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.js
        elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
          echo "Executing Makefile"
          make build
        elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
          echo "Executing Gradle build"
          ./gradlew build
        elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
          echo "Executing Maven build"
          mvn clean package
        elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
          echo "Executing npm build"
          npm install
          npm run build
        elif [ -f "setup.py" ]; then
          echo "Executing Python setup"
          python3 setup.py build
        else
          echo "No build configuration found"
          exit 1
        fi
      else
        echo "Build phase disabled"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/
      - target/
      - dist/
      - out/
    expire_in: 1 day
  dependencies:
    - prebuild
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

test:unit:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_TEST" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Running unit tests"
        
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom test script"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.sh
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.py" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom test Python script"
          python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.py
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test_unit.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom unit test script"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test_unit.sh
        elif [ -f "package.json" ] && grep -q "\"test\"" package.json; then
          echo "Running npm tests"
          npm test
        elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
          echo "Running Maven tests"
          mvn test
        elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
          echo "Running Gradle tests"
          ./gradlew test
        else
          echo "No test configuration found, skipping"
        fi
      else
        echo "Test phase disabled"
      fi
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit:
        - "**/test-results/**/*.xml"
        - "**/junit.xml"
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
    expire_in: 1 week
  dependencies:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

test:integration:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_TEST" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Running integration tests"
        
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test_integration.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom integration test script"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test_integration.sh
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/integration.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing integration script"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/integration.sh
        else
          echo "No integration test script found, skipping"
        fi
      else
        echo "Test phase disabled"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - integration-results/
    expire_in: 1 week
  dependencies:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: always
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true"'
      when: manual
    - when: never

package:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: package
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_PACKAGE" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Running package phase"
        mkdir -p ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
        
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom package script"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.py" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom package Python script"
          python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.py
        elif [ -f "Dockerfile" ]; then
          echo "Building Docker image"
          docker build -t ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} .
          docker save ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} -o ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/docker-image.tar
        else
          echo "Creating default package"
          tar -czf ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No build output to package"
        fi
      else
        echo "Package phase disabled"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/
    expire_in: 1 month
  dependencies:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PACKAGE == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

deploy:staging:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_DEPLOY" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Deploying to staging environment"
        
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy_staging.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom staging deployment script"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy_staging.sh
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom deployment script with staging environment"
          DEPLOY_ENV=staging ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh
        else
          echo "No deployment script found"
          exit 1
        fi
      else
        echo "Deploy phase disabled"
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  dependencies:
    - package
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
    - when: never

deploy:production:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_DEPLOY" = "true" ]; then
        echo "Deploying to production environment"
        
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy_production.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom production deployment script"
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy_production.sh
        elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing custom deployment script with production environment"
          DEPLOY_ENV=production ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh
        else
          echo "No deployment script found"
          exit 1
        fi
      else
        echo "Deploy phase disabled"
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  dependencies:
    - package
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: manual
    - when: never

custom:job:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: .pre
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/custom.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom job script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/custom.sh
      else
        echo "No custom job script found, skipping"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$RUN_CUSTOM_JOB == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never
